title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 07 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 07 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 07 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/02/2022
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate rise in a day. an increase of 2.45% throughout the day. Thefirst trading day after the festival, the market wait-and-see atmosphere is heavy, only a few traders quoted, 20-25 yuan/mt higher than before the Spring Festival.
